product_overview: LexiFlow is a vocabulary learning app that helps Russian-speaking English learners quickly start and maintain a daily learning habit using lightweight onboarding, a focused daily queue, SRS-driven practice (flip/quiz/write), and optional AI-powered writing feedback.
core_goals: Get a new learner to a first meaningful practice session within 2-3 minutes of signing in
Let learners assess and set their CEFR level and choose starter vocabulary aligned to their interests
Provide a small, clear daily learning queue so learners can complete a focused practice session each day
Enable repeated active-practice of vocabulary via flip/quiz/write stages and show immediate results
Offer optional AI writing feedback tied to practiced vocabulary as a voluntary habit builder
Allow users to view and edit profile settings (CEFR level and preferences) and track progress from the dashboard

features.name: User Authentication (email/password)
features.description: Allow learners to sign up and sign in using an email and password so they can access authenticated surfaces and be routed into onboarding when appropriate.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit credentials -> See /dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit sign up -> Be routed to /onboarding
Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Submit without password -> See validation error about missing password

features.name: Onboarding and Level Selection
features.description: A lightweight first-run flow that detects or lets users select a CEFR level, choose topics of interest, and seed their first starter words so they have content for the first session.
user_flows: Navigate to /onboarding -> Answer level test questions -> Select topics of interest -> Confirm starter words to add to deck -> Complete onboarding -> See /dashboard
Navigate to /onboarding -> Skip answering level questions -> Submit -> See validation prompt asking to complete level selection

features.name: Vocabulary Practice (flip / quiz / write)
features.description: Multi-stage practice sessions that present vocabulary cards for active recall, quizzes, and written production with immediate result feedback and session summaries.
user_flows: Navigate to /practice -> View vocabulary cards -> Recall or translate the current card (active recall) -> Submit answer -> View immediate result for that card -> Continue to next card -> See session summary on completion
Navigate to /practice -> View vocabulary cards -> Submit answers for a quiz stage -> View aggregated results and progress

features.name: Optional AI Writing Challenge (integrated)
features.description: An optional, post-practice writing prompt that uses the app's AI coach to give feedback tied to practiced vocabulary; clearly optional and post-value.
user_flows: Navigate to /practice -> Complete a review session -> Opt into optional writing challenge -> Write a short response using practiced words -> Submit response -> See AI feedback and suggestions

features.name: Dashboard / Daily Learning Queue
features.description: A dashboard-first surface that communicates a small daily target, shows next queued items and CEFR indicators, and launches the day's focused practice session.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> See daily target and next queued items -> Start today's session from dashboard -> Navigate to /practice -> Begin practice session

features.name: Grammar Hub
features.description: A theory and practice area with CEFR-aligned lessons and short interactive exercises to complement vocabulary practice.
user_flows: Navigate to /grammar -> Browse grammar topics -> Open a lesson -> Complete an interactive exercise -> See lesson completion status

features.name: Profile & Settings
features.description: User profile surface to view and edit CEFR level, learning preferences, and onboarding/completion state.
user_flows: Navigate to /profile -> View current CEFR level and preferences -> Edit CEFR level -> Save changes -> See updated profile
Navigate to /profile -> Enter invalid CEFR value -> Submit -> See validation error about CEFR value

routes.description: New user onboarding and level test

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Login and sign up using email or OAuth

features.name: Vocabulary Practice
features.description: Practice vocabulary words through interactive exercises

features.name: Onboarding
features.description: Set user level and initial vocabulary
